name: Parsley New Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the potatoes.
2. Cut a 1/2-inch strip from the middle of each potato.
3. Place the potatoes in a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole dish.
4. Add water to the dish.
5. Cover with a lid.
6. Cook on High (maximum power) for 10 to 12 minutes, stirring once during cooking.
7. Drain the potatoes and stir in butter, parsley, salt, and pepper.
8. Serve hot. Makes 4 servings.
(Total Cooking Time: 10 To 12 Minutes)
